title: Lead Frontend Developer at Paytm Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Paytm Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Paytm Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Meerut office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
